title: Minecraft Structure to Modified op Structure
description: The most structures in minecraft are now op and you can find these structures easy by a explorer map. also you can get very strong items in the modified op dungeons
body:
**----------Explorer maps--------**

-when you find any of these dungeons

**-Trial chamber**

**-Shiprweck**

**-Pillager outpost**

**-plains village**

you have a chance to get a Explorer map to diffrent dungeons
for example the **Op pillager outpost**
![Pilager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d724bb942004ff6a064d96d0c4f37fd26d045ba_0.webp)

when you open the chest in the outpost there is a chance to get the **OP Mansion explorer map**
![explorer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7b0c9c95ff40659208968b560df39ceb5c699b5.png)
you can get from these dungeons what i list these **explorer maps**

**-Op mansion explorer map** from **Pillager outpost** and **Shipwrecks**

**-Op ancient city explorer map** from **Trial chamber**

**-Op Pillager outpost explorer map** from **Plains village**





**--------Op plains village--------**

when you find in the plains village the **weaponsmith house**
![villahger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a88a5179dbd9c1eac44ada2dd058a39d20742c6.png)

you can get the **Op netherite sword** by the villager who is inside

![trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbba9ecc305bd20147cdeb7f3b030075fabc99c1.png)


**-------Op Trial chamber---------**

When you enter the **Op trial chamber** you must open the **Ominous Vault**
![ominous](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b697524ff6b687a16c898f652d8867f31f9b79.png)

To get the **Op Mace**

![opmacccce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d078138612072015c1d8e0e0faeeb9ffe8120aad.png)

**---------Op Mansion--------**

in the **Op Mansion** you can get 2 Op items At the first there is the **Op Bow**

![opbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ed71362aa81ee51404efee5b186a0be5cca903d.png)

and  you can get the **Op Helmet**

![helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2832602fc97f4f359f01d4133964bf1cf037b1ed.png)



**-------The all dungeons what are now op--------**


**-Op Igloo**

**-Op bastion all diffrent species**

**-Op ocean ruin**

**-Op Shipwreck**

**-Op End city**

**-Op Ancient City**

**-Op Trial chamber**

**-Op Ruin portal**

**-Op Mansion**

**-Op Trial ruin**

**-Op Plains village**
